description: This file provides a module for managing data associated with DOM elements in the Bootstrap JavaScript library. It implements a singleton pattern for storing, retrieving, and removing instances tied to DOM elements using a Map data structure.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Associates a specific instance with a DOM element and key, ensuring only one instance per element for the given key.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves the instance associated with a DOM element and key, or null if none exists.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes the association between an instance and a DOM element for a given key, cleaning up the Map if no instances remain for the element.
